Patch Set 16:

This may cause sanity to not fail with the LBUG from LU-4988 but I can't see how it fixes the unsafe usage pattern among lod, osp, and seq in the general case.

Patch Set 16:

t:lustre-release# git describe
2.5.58-55-g3d26ff8
t:lustre-release# git diff
t:lustre-release# git diff | cat
diff --git a/lustre/tests/sanity.sh b/lustre/tests/sanity.sh
index 925e077..371d43c 100644
--- a/lustre/tests/sanity.sh
+++ b/lustre/tests/sanity.sh
@@ -8959,32 +8959,7 @@ test_133f() {
 run_test 133f "Check for LBUGs/Oopses/unreadable files in /proc"
 
 test_133g() {
-	local proc_dirs="/proc/fs/lustre/ /proc/sys/lnet/ /proc/sys/lustre/"
-	local facet
-
-	# Second verifying readability.
-	find $proc_dirs \
-		-type f \
-		-not -name force_lbug \
-		-not -name changelog_mask \
-		-exec badarea_io '{}' \; > /dev/null
-
-	[ $(lustre_version_code $SINGLEMDS) -le $(version_code 2.5.54) ] &&
-		skip "Too old lustre on MDS"
-
-	[ $(lustre_version_code ost1) -le $(version_code 2.5.54) ] &&
-		skip "Too old lustre on ost1"
-
-	for facet in $SINGLEMDS ost1; do
-		do_facet $facet find $proc_dirs \
-			-type f \
-			-not -name force_lbug \
-			-not -name changelog_mask \
-			-exec badarea_io '{}' \\\; &> /dev/null
-
-	done
-
-	# remount the FS in case writes/reads /proc break the FS
+	# remount the FS
 	cleanup || error "failed to unmount"
 	setup || error "failed to setup"
 	true

parents.subject: LU-4930 llite: add error handler in inode prepare phase

commit.subject: LU-4850 lod: check OSP status before allocate FID
commit.message:
LU-4850 lod: check OSP status before allocate FID

1. Check OSP status before allocate FIDs on it.
2. Check stripe_count before allocate the stripes, to
make sure it is less than MDT count.

Signed-off-by: wang di <di.wang@intel.com>
Change-Id: Ief3669e04daebb07f0e7f870cfd67c6f3f95c040
